title: scribo.create_invoice input
description: Generate an EN 16931-compliant invoice (XRechnung / ZUGFeRD / Factur-X / Peppol BIS / Facturae) or a plain US PDF, depending on the parties' jurisdictions. Returns a download URL.

tax_id.description: VAT ID with country prefix (e.g. DE123456789). Optional for US plain PDF.

contact_email.description: Sender's email — also used as the login email for return visits.

contact_phone.description: Required for German XRechnung (BR-DE-6). Free-form phone number.

contact_name.description: Contact-person name. Required for German XRechnung (BR-DE-5).

contact_email.description: Recipient's accounts-payable / billing email. Required — Scribo refuses to draft without it (seeds the per-tenant business-partner record so the recipient can be reached for the transparency / opt-out flow).

leitweg_id.description: DE B2G — forces XRechnung CII when present

unit_code.description: UN/ECE Recommendation 20 (e.g. HUR for hours, DAY for days, EA each)

tax_category_code.description: EN 16931 tax category. User picks; Scribo does not infer. S=standard, Z=zero, E=exempt, AE=reverse charge, K=intra-community, G=free export, O=outside scope.

due_date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. BT-9 (Payment due date).

payment_terms.description: BT-20 free-text payment terms (e.g. 'Net 14'). At least one of due_date or payment_terms is recommended; otherwise Scribo defaults to 'Due upon receipt' to satisfy EN 16931 BR-CO-25.

delivery_date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. BT-72 (Actual delivery / service date). When unset, Scribo defaults to the issue date to satisfy EN 16931 / Factur-X BR-FX-EN-04.

delivery_period.description: BG-14 (Invoicing period) — service span when work was delivered over a date range. Mutually exclusive with delivery_date.

idempotency_key.description: Optional. Same key + same inputs returns the original invoice.
